messages.content: Hello! Here is python code that I wrote. Can you rewrite it in c++ with time optimization. (I will send you the code and the task that it is for)
Sure, please share the code and the task.
The program that you wrote works fantastically, however I have a question. Is there a way you can optimize the code for time any further?
The optimizations worked well for the used memory, however the code is still too slow. Maybe, you can edit this code or create your own, using an more optimal algorithm?

For some reason, this test:
3
X..
Gives outputs YES instead of NO
But the character can jump further than 3 cells, in fact, he can jump over 1 or more cells

This new version of the code once again outputs the wrong answer to this test:
3
X..
It outputs YES instead of NO
